import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; const CardInfoRightBlock = () => { const { id } = useParams(); const [tour, setTour] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { fetch('/api/tours.json') .then(res => { if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`); return res.json(); }) .then(data => { const foundTour = data.find(t => t.id === parseInt(id)); setTour(foundTour); setLoading(false); }) .catch(err => { console.error('❌ tours.json:', err); setLoading(false); }); }, [id]); if (loading || !tour) { return (
